item.title: This grown cat is STILL nursing and has NO shame 🐱 This tabby is a WHOLE adult. Full size. Full grown. And he's right there squeezing in between the newborn kittens like he belongs. 🍼 I grabbed him by the neck to pull him off. He looked at me like "and?"
item.description: By @airealscenes: This grown cat is STILL nursing and has NO shame 🐱 This tabby is a WHOLE adult. Full size. Full grown. And he's right there squeezing in between the newborn kittens like he belongs. 🍼 I grabbed him by the neck to pull him off. He looked at me like "and?"

item.title: EDIT: I rescued this kitten. He’s a foster. He was the last one of the litter left. I’m well aware kittens do better in pairs. It’s why i have 6 of my own. I’m actively working on trying to find him a companion | safe to say he enjoyed
item.description: By @malpluscats: EDIT: I rescued this kitten. He’s a foster. He was the last one of the litter left. I’m well aware kittens do better in pairs. It’s why i have 6 of my own. I’m actively working on trying to find him a companion | safe to say he enjoyed
